title: Succulent Care collection
description: Data contract for plants.json — the per-plant records rendered by index.html. See CLAUDE.md for the meaning of the level and dormancy enums.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

plants.description: Every plant in the collection. Must stay in sync with plants.md (one entry per Latin name).

level.description: Relative need bucket. See CLAUDE.md for the exact light/water definitions.

careText.description: One care paragraph. Plain text (no HTML). A leading ⚠ flags a hazard.

id.description: Stable, arbitrary kebab-case slug. Also the image filename stem (images/<id>.jpg) and the #<id> deep-link hash. Never change an existing id.

latin.description: Academic (Latin) name — the only name shown on the card and detail sheet. The join key to plants.md.

family.description: Botanical family (e.g. Cactaceae). Shown as a chip.

habit.description: Growth habit (e.g. Caudex, Cactus). Shown as a chip.

dormancy.description: When the plant rests. Drives the Dormancy filter and the corner tag: summer=Summer dormant, winter=Winter dormant, none=Evergreen.

care.description: The detail-sheet copy. All six sections are required and rendered in this order.
